name: heagvehiclelivedatautils

metadata.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils
metadata.summary: some tools for working with vehicle livedata for trams in darmstadt

documentation: provides some tools for working with vehiclelivedata used in [this app](https://heagmobilo-live.geomobile.de/).

modules.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.process
documentation: methods for working with collection of vehicle data.

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.process.trams_in_service
documentation:
list the lines the trams are in service on, based on the presented vehicleData

Args:
    vehicledata_df (DataFrame): dataFrame as given by vehicleData_from_jsonFiles

Returns:
    DataFrame: DataFrame indexed by timestamps that contains the line the selected trams are in service on

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.process.number_of_trams_in_service
documentation:
counts the number of trams in each class, that are in servie for at each timestamp
TODO: ahh grammar

Args:
    trams_in_service_df: the service dataframe

Returns: dataframe containing the counts per class at each timestamp

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.process.buses_in_service
documentation:
list the lines the buses are in service on, based on the presented vehicleData

Args:
    vehicledata_df (DataFrame): dataFrame as given by vehicleData_from_jsonFiles

Returns:
    DataFrame: DataFrame indexed by timestamps that contains the line the selected trams are in service on

modules.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.read
documentation: Methods for reading vehiclelivedata from json

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.read.verify_vehicledata_format
documentation:
checks if dataframe contains a valid vehicle data format
Args:
    dataframe: dataframe to check

Throws: Value error if dataframe is not formatted correctly

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.read.vehicledata_from_json
documentation:
extracts service information of public transport vehicles into a Dataframe

Args:
    vehicledata_json_dict (JSON dict): data structured like vehicleData from HEAG vehicleLivedata api

Returns:
    DataFrame: contains the information from the vehicleData, indexed with timestamp and vehicleId
# data reading

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleDataUtils.read.vehicledata_from_json_files
documentation:
reads vehicleData from .json files and
extracts service information of public transport vehicles into a Dataframe

Args:
    vehicledata_json_file_paths (list): list of paths pointing to the .json files containing the vehicleData

Returns:
    DataFrame: contains the information from the vehicleData, indexed with timestamp and vehicleId

modules.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.apiUtils
documentation: provides utilities to work with the apis relvant for vehicledata

documentation: request vehicleLiveData form api

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.apiUtils.getStationData

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.apiUtils.get_current_vehicle_data_as_dataframe

gets current vehiclelivedata from api and  returns it as a dataframe

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleInformation.tram_class_prefix
documentation:
gives the class prefix for the vehicle number of the given tram

Args:
    vehicle_id: the (TODO: vehicleID) of a tram without the class prefix

Returns:
    string: the class prefix of that tram

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleInformation.get_tram_number
documentation:
gives the full id number of the tram vehicle

Args:
    vehicle_id: the vehicle Id number of the tram whose full id number is to be returned.

Returns:
    str: the full id number of the tram vehicle

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleInformation.encode_line_name
documentation:
encodes the string representation of the line identifier into a unique int

Args: lineName: the line identifier as a string

Returns:
    int: the encoded line identifier

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.vehicleInformation.decode_line_id
documentation:
decodes the sting representation of the line identifier encoded in the lineId

Args:
    line_id: the encoded line identifier, as given by mapLineName

Returns:
    str: sting representation of the line name

modules.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.plot
documentation:
provides the DataAnalysis class which provides tools for plotting the vehicle data

TODO: stuff for ploting data

functions.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.plot.__plot_vehicle_service_timeseries__
documentation:
plots the timeseries

Args:
    vehicle_service_timeseries: dataframe containing timeseries with vehicle service
    show_line_annotation: if true, line Names will also be plotted
    datespec: specifies how timestamp is displayed -> used as argument for pandas strftime
    filename: path of file that is used to save the plot. if left empty, nothing will be saved
    show_plot: true if the plot should be shown
    sample_time: sample size of the plot
    figsize: matplotlib figsize to be used for the plot
    title: title of the plot

classes.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.plot.DataAnalysis

methods.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.plot.DataAnalysis.__init__
documentation:
Args:
    vehicledata: dataframe containing vehicle data. if vehicledata_path or response_paths are specified, this will be disregarded

    vehicledata_path: path to directory where to look for vehicle data json files. if vehicledata is specified, this will be disregarded
    response_paths: paths of files containing vehicle data json. if vehicledata_path or vehicledata are specified, this will be disregarded

methods.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.plot.DataAnalysis.__set_analyse_path__
documentation:
provide vehicle data via a directory to scan.

Args:
    vehicledata_path: path to directory where to look for vehicle data json files

methods.name: heagVehicleLivedataUtils.plot.DataAnalysis.__set_response_paths__
documentation:
provide vehicle via files containing vehicle data json.

Args:
    api_response_paths: paths of files containing vehicle data json

provide vehicledata dataframe directly
